title: Add HorizontalPodAutoscaler sub-reconciler
summary: Review #3 following external review feedback from berendt. All three blocking/warning issues have been correctly addressed: (1) autoscaling RBAC rule added to Helm ClusterRole template with correct apiGroup, resource, and verbs matching the kubebuilder marker; (2) CRD YAMLs regenerated in both config/crd/bases/ and helm/crds/ with complete autoscaling schema including CEL XValidation; (3) normalizeMap closure extracted to a package-level unexported function, eliminating duplication between EnsurePDB and EnsureHPA. All tests pass, go vet clean.

code_quality_checklist.item: normalizeMap extracted as package-level function (W-001 fix)

security_checklist.item: RBAC rule in Helm ClusterRole matches controller markers (B-001 fix)
All 12 kubebuilder RBAC markers have matching Helm ClusterRole entries

architecture_checklist.item: CRD YAML regenerated with autoscaling schema (B-002 fix)
Both CRD copies (config/crd/bases and helm/crds) are consistent
CEL XValidation rule present in CRD schema
Solution is as simple as possible

dry_yagni_checklist.item: normalizeMap shared between EnsurePDB and EnsureHPA

fail_fast_checklist.item: CEL validation prevents invalid autoscaling config at admission

suggested_improvements: I-002 from berendt review: Consider introducing a shared test-utils package to consolidate int32Ptr and ptr[T] helpers across test packages (follow-up, not blocking)
I-001 from berendt review: Consider backporting the update-guard pattern from EnsurePDB/EnsureHPA to EnsureDeployment and EnsureService in a follow-up PR
next_steps: PR is ready for final merge — all blocking and warning issues from external review #2 have been addressed
